summary: Computer Science Engineering student with 8.88 CGPA and proven expertise in full-stack development, machine learning, and blockchain technology. Developed 4+ production-ready applications serving 1000+ users, including an AI interview platform and blockchain EHR system. Skilled in React, Node.js, Python, and AWS cloud services. Seeking to leverage technical expertise and problem-solving abilities to build innovative software solutions.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Development Intern
description: Developed RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express, reducing API response time by 40% through query optimization and caching strategies
Built responsive React components with TypeScript, improving user engagement by 25% and mobile conversion by 15%
Implemented MongoDB database schemas with proper indexing, supporting 10,000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime
Collaborated with 3-person agile team to deliver 5 major features 2 weeks ahead of schedule using Git workflows

experience.title: Data Scientist Intern
description: Conducted comprehensive data analysis on 50,000+ records using Python and Pandas, identifying key business insights that increased revenue by 15%
Developed predictive machine learning models using Scikit-learn with 85% accuracy, contributing to data-driven decision-making
Created interactive data visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn, presenting findings to executive team
Automated data preprocessing pipeline, reducing manual data cleaning time by 70%

projects.name: AI Interview Preparation Platform
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered platform using OpenAI API that generates personalized interview questions and provides real-time feedback. Serves 500+ monthly users with 95% satisfaction rate, reducing interview preparation time by 60%.
highlights: Implemented GPT-4 API for question generation, achieving 90% relevance accuracy
Built real-time feedback system using WebSocket for instant response analysis
Achieved 95% user satisfaction rate through iterative UX improvements

projects.name: Blockchain Based EHR System
projects.description: Built a secure and tamper-proof blockchain-based Electronic Health Record system using Ethereum smart contracts, ensuring data integrity and HIPAA compliance for medical records. Implemented IPFS for decentralized storage.
highlights: Achieved 100% data immutability through blockchain integration
Reduced data breach risk by 95% compared to traditional systems
Implemented role-based access control for 5+ user types (doctors, patients, admins)

projects.name: Invigilation Management System
projects.description: Designed and developed a full-stack web-based system to automate exam scheduling, invigilation allocation, and seating arrangements for 2000+ students. Reduced administrative workload by 75% and eliminated scheduling conflicts.
highlights: Automated scheduling algorithm reduced conflicts by 100%
Implemented real-time notifications for 500+ faculty members
Achieved 99.5% system uptime during peak examination periods

projects.name: Mini Social Media Platform
projects.description: Engineered a lightweight social networking platform featuring user authentication, real-time posting, and interactive functionalities. Built scalable architecture supporting 10,000+ concurrent users with WebSocket integration.
highlights: Built responsive design with 95% mobile usability score

achievements: Lead Developer in College Technical Fest 2024
Published research paper on AI in Healthcare Applications

achievements.description: Won 1st place among 100+ teams for developing AI-powered healthcare solution, receiving $5000 prize and incubation opportunity
